title: Crimson Steve's Mutant Mobs
description: Yet another mutant monsters mod here! This mod adds mutants in my style.
body:
This mod adds mutant mobs in my style! Mobs in this mod will spawn nearby their original form usually. Below, there are list of mobs and explanations of them.
 
Requires Geckolib!\
ㄴ New beta builds don't require any other apis, but fabric users should use [kilt api](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt) for running
 
 This mod was called "simple mutant mobs", but since the mod is far away from "simple", I changed its title to like this.

 Description below is for former beta builds. I'll update description for newer builds after finishing release them.

 

1. Stunt Skeleton

![mutant skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e45b9c3ab860e3cf273f2249efdce863be5a3afb.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D74Oc1-sNUE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 Unlike its ancestors, it found that it would be stronger without its bow. So it will use various martial arts to kill you and villagers. Golems are included too! It spawns naturally when the skeleton is nearby.
 
Drops
> 1 ~ 10 bones\
> 25% chance for skull
 
Attack Lists

1.  Punch: Most usual attack it uses. Can be linked to another punch, kick, or uppercut.
2. Smash: Jumps into the air and strikes the ground. Can be linked to uppercut.
3. Uppercut: Jumps into the air very high and throws the attacked mobs as well. Can be used after using certain attacks.
4. Leap: Leaps into random direction for evasion. But can be linked to smash.
5. Kick: Knockbacks the attacked mob heavily. Can be linked to punch or smash. After pushed back, its distance from the attacked mob is perfectly fits the jump range of smash attack so be careful!

</details>

\
2. Hopkeleton & Withered Hopkeleton

![hopkeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/724653d6c06c89a2ab7bc50c0dfdb9ae7b982911_0.webp) ![withered hopkeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d44f333072ca6ee4c01fa5117737c95f83ec1e21_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Their legs were mutated, which made them unable to walk. However, it also made their jumping ability even better. Now they hop instead of walking.

 

Drops

ㄴ 1 ~ 4 bones

ㄴ 1% chance for skull

ㄴ wither variant will drop some coals and wither skull

 

Attack Lists

ㄴ Body slam: When they trying to use this attack, they raise their arms when hopping. When they reach the max height, they will lean their body forward and rush toward their target. Wither variant will inflict wither effect on target too.

</details>
